orchestration.notes: LocalAgent STOPPED. All remaining work handed to local agents. Pick up where left off.

pendingCommands.label: MONITOR: Poll PR #3 CI checks until all green

value.prompt: Poll PR #3 CI status every 30s. When all checks pass, proceed to auto-merge. If any fail, escalate to local-review-agent.

pendingCommands.label: MERGE: Auto-merge PR #3 when CI green

value.prompt: When CI checks all pass, merge PR #3 with squash. Report merge commit hash.

pendingCommands.label: CLEANUP: Delete feature branch after merge

value.command: git checkout main && git pull && git branch -d fix/multi-orchestrator-guardrails
value.prompt: After merge, switch to main, pull latest, delete local feature branch.

Create .github/AGENT_ORGCHART.md documenting all agent roles, responsibilities, skills, escalation rules. Include: CEO Agent, CI-Enforcer, Test Agents, Lint Agents, Git Agents, PR Agents, Merge Agents, Cleanup Agents, Monitor Agents, Review Agents, Documentation Agents, Backlog Agent.

pendingCommands.label: DOCS: Update README.md with custom agents section for Kiro reuse

value.prompt: Update README.md with 'Custom Agents & Reusable Templates' section. Document: orchestration-controls.json format, agent workflow, how to export templates for Kiro project, ci-enforcer-agent.sh example, skills list, guardrails.

pendingCommands.label: MONITOR: Terminal status updates every 10 seconds

value.prompt: Start ci-enforcer-agent.sh which polls every 30s. Additionally print orchestrator dashboard every 10s showing: progress %, orchestrator statuses, CI checks, queued/running/completed counts.
